config.title: Twoja firma dzisiaj #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
function transfer_onrecord_change() fill_srodki() fill_sprzed() #ifndef _SISCO fill_magazyn() #endif fill_zamow() fill_zadania() fill_zobow() fill_nalez() #ifdef APPCONFIG_NEW_TWOJA_FIRMA_DZISIAJ 'fill_srodki_obrotowe() #else fill_srodki_obrotowe() #endif 'update_infobar() end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
#include "50222" #include "50126"
'getCurrentFirma #include "50203"
function fopen()
fopen = std_fopen()
if not fopen then exit function end if
section_fopen THIS_FILE
'e_infobar()
page_.topelement.backcolor=RGB(255,255,255)
page_.enableedit = true
page_.cmdenabled CMD_NEWFORM, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_SAVEFORM, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_DELETEFORM, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_ENABLEEDIT, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_UNDO, false
page_.cmdenabled CMD_FIRSTINCURSOR, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_PREVINCURSOR, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_NEXTINCURSOR, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_LASTINCURSOR, false page_.cmdenabled CMD_SEARCH, false
transfer_onrecord_change
end function
function update_infobar() page_.ctrl(ITEM_INFO).text = " Karta prezentuje informacje na temat stanu Twojej firmy" end function
function make_infobar() VBCARDTOOLSANDINFOBAR_MAKE pCell.addnew CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, ITEM_INFO end function
'varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=43016 appvar_raport_type=RAPORT_ILOSC
function fill_srodki dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_SRODKI_TABLE)).removeall
dim rs:set rs=trans_.createadors(doc_.getmodule(60300).bqry_stan_kasybanku_rejestrami("(select n5rejestrdok.idobj from n5rejestrdok where n5rejestrdok.eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY,N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY) and n5rejestrdok.eAktywny=1)")) dim curSrodkiEwid : curSrodkiEwid = ccur(0.0) dim hli while not rs.eof dim strRejestr: strRejestr = cstr(rs("c_idrej").value) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_TRANSAKCJE appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_PLATNOSCI_LISTA appvar_rejestr_dokumentow="+cstr(rs("c_idrej").value)+" vs4100='"+cstr(strRejestr)+"'")
dim g_curKurs dim oRejestr : set oRejestr = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK, clng(strRejestr)) dim bRes : bRes = doc_.getmodule(60182).kantor_external(100.0, oRejestr.wrefParam1, getCurrentFirma().pWaluta, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY), N5KURSWALUT_SPRZEDAZY, g_curKurs)
dim curRejestrSrodki : curRejestrSrodki = ccur(rs("c_stan").value)
'dim curRejestrSrodkiEwid : curRejestrSrodkiEwid = ccur(rs("c_stanewid").value) dim curRejestrSrodkiEwid : curRejestrSrodkiEwid = ccur(curRejestrSrodki * g_curKurs / ccur(100.0))
tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli cstr(rs("c_nazwarej").value),hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(curRejestrSrodki,cstr(rs("c_waluta").value)) tab.cell.align = clng(1) tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(curRejestrSrodkiEwid,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1) curSrodkiEwid = curSrodkiEwid + curRejestrSrodkiEwid rs.movenext wend page_.ctrl(CTRL_SRODKI_DESC).text = _ "Dostępne środki : " + doc_.afc.display.money (curSrodkiEwid,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot)
g_dostepne = curSrodkiEwid end function
function get_sprzedaz_for_time_range(byval dDateOd,byval dDateDo) dim strQuery : strQuery = "select isnull(sum(isnull(t_sprz.curSumaNetto,0)) - sum(isnull(t_orgsprz.curSumaNetto,0)),0) " +_ "from n5sprzedaz t_sprz left outer join n5sprzedaz t_orgsprz on t_sprz.ppopsprzed = t_orgsprz.idobj " +_ "where t_sprz.pRozlVAT<>0 and (t_sprz.dDataWyst between %1 and %2) and " +_ "t_sprz.pRejestrDok not in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA, N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA)) " dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors( _ trans_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQuery) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDateOd)) _ .add(trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDateDo)).done() _ ) get_sprzedaz_for_time_range = ccur(oRS(0).value) end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_NEW_TWOJA_FIRMA_DZISIAJ function fill_sprzed dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_SPRZED_TABLE)).removeall dim cur_kwota dim dDateOd dim dDateDo dDateOd = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) dDateDo = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) cur_kwota = get_sprzedaz_for_time_range(dDateOd,dDateDo) page_.ctrl(CTRL_SPRZED_DESC).text = "Sprzedaż dzisiaj : " + doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=43026 appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_SPRZEDAZ_ZESTAWIENIE_SZCZEGOLOWE appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_TODAY vs4100="+cstr(0)+"") tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli("Dzisiaj",hli).element.bold = true tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1)
dim iter for iter = 1 to month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) dDateOd = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateOd = DateSerial(year(dDateOd),iter,1) if iter = 12 then dDateDo = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateDo = DateSerial(year(dDateDo),12,31) else dDateDo = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateDo = DateSerial(year(dDateDo),iter+1,0) end if cur_kwota = get_sprzedaz_for_time_range(dDateOd,dDateDo) dim strMonth strMonth = month(dDateDo) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=43026 appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_SPRZEDAZ_ZESTAWIENIE_SZCZEGOLOWE appvar_date_range=7 vs4100="+cstr(strMonth)+"") tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli monthname(iter),hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1) next
dDateOd = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateOd = DateSerial(year(dDateOd),1,1) dDateDo = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateDo = DateSerial(year(dDateDo),12,31) cur_kwota = get_sprzedaz_for_time_range(dDateOd,dDateDo) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_DOKHANDL appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_SPRZEDAZ_PODSUMOWANIE_MIESIACAMI appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_CURRENT_YEAR") tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli("Rok " + cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))),hli).element.bold = true tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1) end function #else function fill_sprzed dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_SPRZED_TABLE)).removeall dim cur_kwota dim dDateOd dim dDateDo dDateOd = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) dDateDo = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) cur_kwota = get_sprzedaz_for_time_range(dDateOd,dDateDo) page_.ctrl(CTRL_SPRZED_DESC).text = "Sprzedaż dzisiaj : " + doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,"") dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=43017 appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_VAT_SPRZEDAZ_PODSUMOWANIE appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_TODAY") tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli "dzisiaj",hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,"") tab.cell.align = clng(1)
dDateOd = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateOd = DateSerial(year(dDateOd),month(dDateOd),1) dDateDo = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateDo = DateSerial(year(dDateDo),month(dDateDo)+1,0) cur_kwota = get_sprzedaz_for_time_range(dDateOd,dDateDo) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=43017 appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_VAT_SPRZEDAZ_PODSUMOWANIE appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_CURRENT_MONTH") tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli monthname(month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))),hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,"") tab.cell.align = clng(1)
dDateOd = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateOd = DateSerial(year(dDateOd),1,1) dDateDo = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) : dDateDo = DateSerial(year(dDateDo),12,31) cur_kwota = get_sprzedaz_for_time_range(dDateOd,dDateDo) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_DOKHANDL appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_SPRZEDAZ_PODSUMOWANIE_MIESIACAMI appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_CURRENT_YEAR") tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli "rok " + cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))),hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,"") tab.cell.align = clng(1) end function #endif
function fill_magazyn if doc_.getmodule(60253).gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(true) then
dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_MAGAZYN_TABLE)).removeall dim rs:set rs=trans_.createadors(query_for_mag()) dim hli dim wart_mag,wart_all,mag,wal wart_all = ccur(0)
do while not rs.eof mag = cstr(rs.fields("mag").value) wart_mag = ccur(rs.fields("suma").value) wal = cstr(rs.fields("wal").value) wart_all = wart_all + wart_mag tab.newrow set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI=raport_magazyn vs1=" + cstr(rs.fields("mag_id").value)) tab.newcell.addtexthli mag , hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(wart_mag) , wal ) tab.cell.align = clng(1)
rs.movenext loop
page_.ctrl(CTRL_MAGAZYN_DESC).text = "Wartość magazynów : " + doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(wart_all) , wal ) g_magazyn = wart_all else page_.ctrl(CTRL_MAGAZYN_DESC).text = "Wartość magazynów nie może być ustalona" g_magazyn = ccur(-1) end if
end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_NEW_TWOJA_FIRMA_DZISIAJ function fill_zamow dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZAMOW_TABLE)).removeall dim rsDzis:set rsDzis=trans_.createadors("select 1 as row, sum(c_curiloscopakpoz*c_curcenanetto) as kwota from vlist_n5zamowienie_listpozycje where (p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE)) and vlist_n5zamowienie_listpozycje.c_curIloscOpakPoz <> 0 and day(c_pzam_dDataReal)="+cstr(day(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))+_ " and month(c_pzam_dDataReal)="+cstr(month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))+" and year(c_pzam_dDataReal)="+cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))) dim rsMies set rsMies=trans_.createadors("select 2 as row, sum(c_curiloscopakpoz*c_curcenanetto) as kwota,max(c_pzam_dDataReal) as datareal "+_ " from vlist_n5zamowienie_listpozycje where (p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE)) "+_ " and vlist_n5zamowienie_listpozycje.c_curIloscOpakPoz <> 0 and year(c_pzam_dDataReal) >= "+cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) +_ " group by year(c_pzam_dDataReal), month(c_pzam_dDataReal) order by year(c_pzam_dDataReal), month(c_pzam_dDataReal) ")
dim rsRok :set rsRok =trans_.createadors("select 3 as row, sum(c_curiloscopakpoz*c_curcenanetto) as kwota from vlist_n5zamowienie_listpozycje where (p_pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE)) and vlist_n5zamowienie_listpozycje.c_curIloscOpakPoz <> 0 and year(c_pzam_dDataReal)=" + cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))) dim hli tab.newrow dim cur_kwota if isnull(cur_kwota) then cur_kwota = 0 end if
cur_kwota = rsDzis.fields("kwota").value if isnull(cur_kwota) then cur_kwota = 0 end if page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZAMOW_DESC).text = "Zamówienia na dziś : " + doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_PROD appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZAMOWIENIA_DO_REAL_WG_PRODUKT appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_TODAY") tab.newcell.addtexthli("Dzisiaj",hli).element.bold = true tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1)
tab.newrow
dim iMc, curKwota for iMc = 1 to 12 'month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) tab.newrow curKwota = ccur(0) set hli = nothing if not rsMies.eof then dim dDataReal : dDataReal = cdate(rsMies.fields("datareal").value) if month(dDataReal) = iMc and year(dDataReal) = year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) then curKwota = ccur(rsMies.fields("kwota").value) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_PROD appvar_raport_type=" +_ "RAPTEMPLATE_ZAMOWIENIA_DO_REAL_WG_PRODUKT appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_RANGE vs4100=" +_ cstr(dateserial(year(dDataReal),month(dDataReal),1))) rsMies.movenext end if end if
tab.newcell.addtexthli monthname(iMc),hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( curKwota ,"PLN") tab.cell.align = clng(1) next
tab.newrow cur_kwota = rsRok.fields("kwota").value if isnull(cur_kwota) then cur_kwota = 0 end if set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_PROD appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZAMOWIENIA_DO_REAL_WG_PRODUKT appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_CURRENT_YEAR") tab.newcell.addtexthli("Rok " + cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))),hli).element.bold = true tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1)
do while not rsMies.eof curKwota = ccur(rsMies.fields("kwota").value) dDataReal = cdate(rsMies.fields("datareal").value) set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_PROD appvar_raport_type=" +_ "RAPTEMPLATE_ZAMOWIENIA_DO_REAL_WG_PRODUKT appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_RANGE vs4100=" +_ cstr(dateserial(year(dDataReal),month(dDataReal),1)))
tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli monthname(month(dDataReal)) + " " + cstr(year(dDataReal)),hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( curKwota ,"PLN") tab.cell.align = clng(1)
rsMies.movenext loop
end function #else function fill_zamow dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZAMOW_TABLE)).removeall dim rs:set rs=trans_.createadors("select 1 as row, sum(curSumaNetto) as kwota from n5zamowienie where (pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE)) and day(dDataReal)="+cstr(day(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))+" and month(dDataReal)="+cstr(month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))+" and year(dDataReal)="+cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))+" union select 2 as row , sum(curSumaNetto) as kwota from n5zamowienie where (pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE)) and month(dDataReal)="+cstr(month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))+" and year(dDataReal)="+cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))+" union select 3 as row, sum(curSumaNetto) as kwota from n5zamowienie where (pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE)) and year(dDataReal)=" + cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)))) dim hli while not rs.eof tab.newrow dim cur_kwota:cur_kwota = rs.fields("kwota").value if isnull(cur_kwota) then cur_kwota = 0 end if select case clng(rs.fields("row").value) case 1 page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZAMOW_DESC).text = "Zamówienia na dziś : " + doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,"") set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_PROD appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZAMOWIENIA_DO_REAL_WG_PRODUKT appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_TODAY") tab.newcell.addtexthli "Dzisiaj",hli case 2 set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_PROD appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZAMOWIENIA_DO_REAL_WG_PRODUKT appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_CURRENT_MONTH") tab.newcell.addtexthli monthname(month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))),hli case 3 set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_PROD appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZAMOWIENIA_DO_REAL_WG_PRODUKT appvar_date_range=PARAM_DATE_MODE_CURRENT_YEAR") tab.newcell.addtexthli "Rok " + cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))),hli end select tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(cur_kwota) ,"") tab.cell.align = clng(1) rs.movenext wend end function #endif
function fill_zadania page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZADANIA_DESC).text = "Zadania do wykonania : 12212" dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZADANIA_TABLE)).removeall
dim rs set rs=trans_.createadors("select 0 as type, max(n5wykonawca.strIndeks) as nazwa , count(n5zadanie.idobj) as ilosc," +_ " max(n5wykonawca.idobj) as id from n5wykonawca left outer join n5zadanie on n5zadanie.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj" +_ " group by n5wykonawca.idobj having n5wykonawca.idobj in (select idobj from n5wykonawca where eAktywny=N5WYKONAWCA_AKTYWNY) and count(n5zadanie.idobj) > 0 " +_ " union select 1,max(n5wykonawca.strIndeks) , count(n5zadanie.idobj), max(n5wykonawca.idobj)" +_ " from n5wykonawca left outer join n5zadanie on n5zadanie.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj" +_ " where(n5zadanie.nStatus<040 AND n5zadanie.eTypterminZak IN (3,4) AND (n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak < "+_ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))+" OR (n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak = "+_ doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))+" AND n5zadanie.tCzasTerminZak<"+_ cstr(trans_.var(GVAR_SYSTIME))+"))) group by n5wykonawca.idobj having n5wykonawca.idobj in (select idobj from n5wykonawca where eAktywny=N5WYKONAWCA_AKTYWNY) and count(n5zadanie.idobj) > 0 order by 2,1")
dim hli dim typ,prev dim all,przet all = 0 przet = 0 prev = clng(-1) while not rs.eof if clng(rs.fields("type").value) = 0 then set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_ZADANIA varNewThread=1 " +_ "appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZADANIA_DO_WYK_WG_WYKON vs2='" + cstr(rs.fields("nazwa").value) + "'") tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli cstr(rs.fields("nazwa").value),hli tab.newcell.addtext cstr(rs.fields("ilosc").value) all = all + cint(rs.fields("ilosc").value) tab.cell.align = clng(2) rs.movenext if not rs.eof then if clng(rs.fields("type").value) = 0 then tab.newcell.addtext cstr(0) tab.cell.align = clng(2) tab.element.forecolor=rgb(255,0,0) else tab.newcell.addtext cstr(rs.fields("ilosc").value) przet = przet + cint(rs.fields("ilosc").value) tab.cell.align = clng(2) tab.element.forecolor=rgb(255,0,0) end if else tab.newcell.addtext cstr(0) tab.cell.align = clng(2) tab.element.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) end if else rs.movenext end if wend page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZADANIA_DESC).text = "Zadania do wykonania : " + cstr(all) + " ("+cstr(przet)+")" end function
function make_trans_row(byref tab , byval rs , byval hli) tab.newrow tab.newcell.addtexthli cstr(rs.fields("podmiot").value),hli tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(rs.fields("il1").value) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1) tab.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( ccur(rs.fields("il2").value) ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) tab.cell.align = clng(1) tab.element.forecolor=rgb(255,0,0) end function
function fill_zobow dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZOBOW_TABLE)).removeall dim rs:set rs=trans_.createadors(query_for_transakcja(N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE)) dim hli dim iter:iter = 1 dim wszystko,przet dim sum_wszystko,sum_przet sum_wszystko = ccur(0) sum_przet = ccur(0) while not rs.eof set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_TRANSAKCJE appvar_raport_type=ZOBOWIAZANIA_NIEROZLICZONE gvar_current_customer='"+cstr(rs.fields("id").value)+"' appvarParamTypeid="+ cstr(rs.fields("typ").value) +" appvarParamIdobj=" + cstr(rs.fields("id").value)) wszystko = ccur(rs.fields("il1").value) przet = ccur(rs.fields("il2").value) sum_wszystko = sum_wszystko + wszystko sum_przet = sum_przet + przet if iter < 11 then ' 10 największych make_trans_row tab , rs , hli end if iter = iter + 1 rs.movenext wend page_.ctrl(CTRL_ZOBOW_DESC).text = "Zobowiązania - kwota : "+ doc_.afc.display.money ( sum_wszystko ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) +" ("+ doc_.afc.display.money ( sum_przet ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) +")" g_zobowiazania = sum_wszystko end function
function query_for_transakcja(byval nTyp) dim order:order = " " if nTyp = N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC then order = " desc " end if
query_for_transakcja = "select typ,id,podmiot,sum(wszystko) as il1, " +_ "sum(przet) as il2 from (select wrefPodmiot_wrt as typ ,wrefPodmiot as id, " +_ "case wrefPodmiot_wrt when TYPEID_N5KLIENT then n5klient.strNazwa when TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK then " +_ "n5pracownik.strNazwisko+' '+n5pracownik.strImie+' '+n5pracownik.strImie2 " +_ "when TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA then n5instytucja.strNazwa " +_ "when TYPEID_N5FIRMA then n5firma.strnazwa " +_ "when TYPEID_N5BANK then n5bank.strNazwa " +_ "end as podmiot, sum(trop_curWnEwid-trop_curMaEwid) as wszystko, " +_ "case when dDataWym < "+doc_.afc.convert.Date2Sql(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))+" then sum(trop_curWnEwid-trop_curMaEwid) " +_ " else 0 end as przet from vw_n5transakcja_trop left outer join n5klient " +_ "on n5klient.idobj=vw_n5transakcja_trop.wrefpodmiot and wrefPodmiot_wrt=TYPEID_N5KLIENT " +_ "left outer join n5pracownik on n5pracownik.idobj=vw_n5transakcja_trop.wrefpodmiot and wrefPodmiot_wrt=TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK " +_ "left outer join n5instytucja on n5instytucja.idobj=vw_n5transakcja_trop.wrefpodmiot and wrefPodmiot_wrt=TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA " +_ "left outer join n5firma on n5firma.idobj=vw_n5transakcja_trop.wrefpodmiot and wrefPodmiot_wrt=TYPEID_N5FIRMA " +_ "left outer join n5bank on n5bank.idobj=vw_n5transakcja_trop.wrefpodmiot and wrefPodmiot_wrt=TYPEID_N5BANK " +_ "where (wrefPodmiot_wrt = TYPEID_N5KLIENT) and (trop_curWn <> trop_curMa) AND (eTyp="+cstr(nTyp)+") " +_ #ifdef _IOW "and n5klient.ePrywat <> N5KLIENT_OSOBAPRYWATNA " +_ #endif "group by case vw_n5transakcja_trop.wrefPodmiot_wrt when TYPEID_N5KLIENT then n5klient.strNazwa " +_ "when TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK then n5pracownik.strNazwisko+' '+n5pracownik.strImie+' '+n5pracownik.strImie2 " +_ "when TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA then n5instytucja.strNazwa " +_ "when TYPEID_N5FIRMA then n5firma.strnazwa " +_ "when TYPEID_N5BANK then n5bank.strNazwa " +_ "end,wrefPodmiot_wrt ,wrefPodmiot , dDataWym) as v1 " +_ "group by podmiot,typ,id order by 4 " + order end function
dim g_dostepne dim g_naleznosci dim g_zobowiazania dim g_magazyn
function fill_srodki_obrotowe dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_SO_TABLE)).removeall dim bMagFailed:bMagFailed = false if g_magazyn = -1 then bMagFailed = true g_magazyn = ccur(0) end if page_.ctrl(CTRL_SO_DESC).text = "Srodki obrotowe - kwota : "+ doc_.afc.display.money ( g_dostepne + g_naleznosci + g_zobowiazania + g_magazyn ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot)
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Środki dostepne").element.bold = false 'tab.newcell.addtext "+" tab.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT tab.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(g_dostepne , getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot)
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Należności").element.bold = false 'tab.newcell.addtext "+" tab.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT tab.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(g_naleznosci , getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot)
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Zobowiązania").element.bold = false 'tab.newcell.addtext "-" tab.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT tab.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(g_zobowiazania , getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot)
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Wartość magazynu").element.bold = false 'tab.newcell.addtext "+" tab.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT if not bMagFailed then tab.addtext doc_.afc.display.money(g_magazyn , getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) else tab.addtext "<nie mozna okreslić>" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) end if
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Środki obrotowe").element.bold = true 'tab.newcell.addtext "=" tab.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT tab.addtext doc_.afc.display.money ( g_dostepne + g_naleznosci + g_zobowiazania + g_magazyn ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot)
end function
function fill_nalez dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRL_NALEZ_TABLE)).removeall dim rs:set rs=trans_.createadors(query_for_transakcja(N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC)) dim hli dim iter:iter = 1 dim wszystko,przet dim sum_wszystko,sum_przet sum_wszystko = ccur(0) sum_przet = ccur(0) while not rs.eof set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_TRANSAKCJE appvar_raport_type=NALEZNOSCI_NIEROZLICZONE gvar_current_customer='"+cstr(rs.fields("id").value)+"' appvarParamTypeid="+ cstr(rs.fields("typ").value) +" appvarParamIdobj=" + cstr(rs.fields("id").value)) wszystko = ccur(rs.fields("il1").value) przet = ccur(rs.fields("il2").value) sum_wszystko = sum_wszystko + wszystko sum_przet = sum_przet + przet if iter < 11 then ' 10 największych make_trans_row tab , rs , hli end if iter = iter + 1 rs.movenext wend page_.ctrl(CTRL_NALEZ_DESC).text = "Należności - kwota : "+ doc_.afc.display.money ( sum_wszystko ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) +" ("+ doc_.afc.display.money ( sum_przet ,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) +")" g_naleznosci = sum_wszystko end function
function query_for_mag() query_for_mag = "select " + _ " n5magazyn.strNazwa as mag, " + _ " n5magazyn.idobj as mag_id, " + _ " isnull(sum(gmo_curWartosc),0) as suma, " + _ " max(n5jednostka.strSkrot) as wal " + _ " from n5magazyn " + _ " join n5jednostka on n5jednostka.idobj = n5magazyn.pWaluta " + _ " left outer join n5gmop on n5magazyn.idobj = n5gmop.gmo_pMag " + _ " join n5produkt on n5gmop.gmo_pProd = n5produkt.idobj " + _ " where n5magazyn.eTyp in (N5TYPMAG_PODSTAWOWY,N5TYPMAG_PRODUKCJAWTOKU,N5TYPMAG_REZERWACJE) and n5magazyn.mag_eAktywny=N5PRODUKT_AKTYWNY and n5produkt.eRodzaj = N5PRODUKT_TOWAR " + _ " group by n5magazyn.strNazwa,n5magazyn.idobj order by n5magazyn.strNazwa" end function
function raport_magazyn(hli)
dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray()
dim pExtraParam : set pExtraParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_filter("Typ") pExtraParam.set_where_part "(t_1.idobj="+cstr(hli.prop(1))+")" pParamArray.add pExtraParam
dim pRaportMomentParam:set pRaportMomentParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date("Analizowany moment").bindexpr("") pRaportMomentParam.first_value = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) pRaportMomentParam.mode = clng(1) pParamArray.add pRaportMomentParam 'wolamy raport z zewnatrz trans_.var(APPVAR_RAPORT_FROM_OUTSIDE) = clng(1)
pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Nazwa produktu").bindexpr("t_2.strNazwa") pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Indeks produktu").bindexpr("t_2.strIndeks") pParamArray.add nothing
dim pParamFactory2: set pParamFactory2= doc_.afc.rap.param dim pParam2: Set pParam2= pParamFactory2.new_choice("Status produktu").bindexpr("t_2.eAktywny") pParamFactory2.init_on_enum pParam2, TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,"eAktywny" pParamArray.add pParam2
doc_.getmodule(PAGE_MODULE_RAPORT_CALLER).make_raport_stanmag_wartosc_param pParamArray
end function

page.body:
#ifdef APPCONFIG_NEW_TWOJA_FIRMA_DZISIAJ XCARDBEGIN
Twoja firma dzisiaj
XCARDSECBEG(Zamówienia,927,CTRL_ZAMOW_DESC,C1D576)
Okres
Zamówienia netto
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG(Sprzedaz,922,CTRL_SPRZED_DESC,E7A376)
Okres
Sprzedaż netto
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG(Środki,920,CTRL_SRODKI_DESC,FFD24F)
Kasa / bank
Stan
Wartość księgowa
XCARDSECEND
#ifndef _SISCO XCARDSECBEG(Magazyn,925,CTRL_MAGAZYN_DESC,83F101)
Magazyn
Wartość
XCARDSECEND #endif
XCARDSECBEG(Zobowiązania,931,CTRL_ZOBOW_DESC,CC9BF8)
Podmiot
Wszystkie
Przeterminowane
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG(Nalezności,933,CTRL_NALEZ_DESC,D794B7)
Podmiot
Wszystkie
Przeterminowane
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG(Zadania,929,CTRL_ZADANIA_DESC,36ADAD)
Wykonawca
Wszystkie
Przeterminowane
XCARDSECEND
XCARDEND #else XCARDBEGIN
Twoja firma dzisiaj
XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Środki,920,CTRL_SRODKI_DESC)
Kasa / bank
Stan
Wartość księgowa
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Sprzedaz,922,CTRL_SPRZED_DESC)
Okres
Sprzedaż netto
XCARDSECEND
#ifndef _SISCO XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Magazyn,925,CTRL_MAGAZYN_DESC)
Magazyn
Wartość
XCARDSECEND #endif
XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Zamówienia,927,CTRL_ZAMOW_DESC)
Okres
Zamówienia netto
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Zadania,929,CTRL_ZADANIA_DESC)
Wykonawca
Wszystkie
Przeterminowane
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Zobowiązania,931,CTRL_ZOBOW_DESC)
Podmiot
Wszystkie
Przeterminowane
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Nalezności,933,CTRL_NALEZ_DESC)
Podmiot
Wszystkie
Przeterminowane
XCARDSECEND
XCARDSECBEG_OLD(Środki obrotowe,936,CTRL_SO_DESC)
XCARDSECEND
XCARDEND #endif
